name: gocardless
description: Access GoCardless Direct Debit customers, mandates, and payments, and collect payments against existing mandates

envVars.name: GOCARDLESS_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: GoCardless API access token created in the dashboard under Developers. Use a sandbox token (from manage-sandbox.gocardless.com) for testing or a live token for production.

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List GoCardless customers to find customer IDs and contact details

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

after.description: Pagination cursor: customer ID to return records after

before.description: Pagination cursor: customer ID to return records before

tools.name: List Payments
tools.description: List GoCardless payments with optional status, customer, or mandate filtering

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

status.description: Filter by status: pending_customer_approval, pending_submission, submitted, confirmed, paid_out, cancelled, customer_approval_denied, failed, or charged_back

customer.description: Only return payments for this customer ID, e.g. CU123

mandate.description: Only return payments collected against this mandate ID, e.g. MD123

after.description: Pagination cursor: payment ID to return records after

tools.name: Get Payment
tools.description: Get a single GoCardless payment by ID to check its status, amount, and linked mandate

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

tools.name: List Mandates
tools.description: List Direct Debit mandates to find an active mandate before collecting a payment

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

customer.description: Only return mandates for this customer ID, e.g. CU123

status.description: Filter by status: pending_customer_approval, pending_submission, submitted, active, failed, cancelled, expired, consumed, blocked, or suspended_by_payer

after.description: Pagination cursor: mandate ID to return records after

tools.name: Create Payment
tools.description: Collect a one-off payment against an existing active Direct Debit mandate

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key (max 128 chars) to safely retry without creating duplicate payments

payments.description: Payment resource. Required: amount (integer, in the smallest currency unit, e.g. pence or cents), currency (e.g. GBP, EUR, USD), and links with a mandate ID, e.g. {"amount": 1000, "currency": "GBP", "links": {"mandate": "MD123"}}. Optional: charge_date (YYYY-MM-DD, rolled forward to the mandate's next possible charge date if too early), description, reference, and metadata.

tools.name: Create Subscription
tools.description: Set up a recurring payment collection against an existing active Direct Debit mandate

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key (max 128 chars) to safely retry without creating duplicate subscriptions

subscriptions.description: Subscription resource. Required: amount (integer, in the smallest currency unit), currency (e.g. GBP, EUR, USD), interval_unit (weekly, monthly, or yearly), and links with a mandate ID, e.g. {"amount": 2500, "currency": "GBP", "interval_unit": "monthly", "links": {"mandate": "MD123"}}. Optional: interval (periods between charges), day_of_month, start_date (YYYY-MM-DD), count (total number of payments), name, and metadata.

tools.name: Retry Payment
tools.description: Retry a failed payment if its mandate is still active; a payment can be retried at most three times

paymentId.description: GoCardless payment ID to retry, e.g. PM123 (the payment must be in the failed state)

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

tools.name: List Events
tools.description: List GoCardless events (status changes such as payment failures, chargebacks, and mandate cancellations) for monitoring and audit workflows

GoCardless-Version.description: GoCardless API version date; the current released version is 2015-07-06

payment.description: Only return events for this payment ID, e.g. PM123

mandate.description: Only return events for this mandate ID, e.g. MD123

subscription.description: Only return events for this subscription ID, e.g. SB123

resource_type.description: Filter by resource type, e.g. payments, mandates, subscriptions, refunds, or payouts

action.description: Filter by event action, e.g. failed, charged_back, cancelled, or confirmed (valid actions depend on the resource type)

after.description: Pagination cursor: event ID to return records after

prompts.title: Review recent payments
prompts.prompt: List my most recent GoCardless payments and summarize their statuses, flagging any failed or charged-back payments.

prompts.title: Check mandate health
prompts.prompt: List my GoCardless mandates and report which are active versus cancelled, failed, or expired.

prompts.title: Collect a payment
prompts.prompt: Find the active GoCardless mandate for a customer I specify and collect a payment of the amount I provide.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: GoCardless setup

steps.title: Create a sandbox account for testing
steps.description: Sign up for a free GoCardless sandbox at https://manage-sandbox.gocardless.com/signup. The sandbox lets you create test customers, mandates, and payments without moving real money. Sandbox API requests go to https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com instead of https://api.gocardless.com.

steps.title: Create an access token
steps.description: In the dashboard (https://manage.gocardless.com for live, https://manage-sandbox.gocardless.com for sandbox), go to Developers, then Create and choose Access token. Give it read-write access if you want to create payments.

steps.title: Store the token
steps.description: Add GOCARDLESS_ACCESS_TOKEN=<your token> to your .env file. The token is sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Customers tool. Every request also sends the GoCardless-Version header (2015-07-06 by default), which the API requires.

notes: Tools call the live API at https://api.gocardless.com; for sandbox testing, point requests at https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com with a sandbox token
Amounts are integers in the smallest currency unit (pence/cents), and payments can only be created against mandates in an active or pending state
Every API request must include the GoCardless-Version header; each tool sends 2015-07-06 by default
